properties.name: spring.cloud.polaris.circuitbreaker.configuration-cleanup-interval
properties.description: Interval to clean up PolarisCircuitBreakerConfiguration, unit millisecond.

properties.name: spring.cloud.polaris.circuitbreaker.default-rule-enabled
properties.description: If default circuit breaker rule is enabled.

properties.name: spring.cloud.polaris.circuitbreaker.default-error-count
properties.description: Consecutive error count circuit-breaker default error count.

properties.name: spring.cloud.polaris.circuitbreaker.default-error-percent
properties.description: Error rate circuit-breaker default error rate percent.

properties.name: spring.cloud.polaris.circuitbreaker.default-minimum-request
properties.description: Error rate circuit-breaker default minimum request.
